sizing_rule.note: Position size adjusted via optimal f fraction; growth rate constant at perfect correlation (+1.00) but increases as correlation decreases. Formula: f = (AHPR - 1) / (ME / f$); demonstrated geometric mean 1.06066 growth factor ($100 → $126.56 over 4 plays). Applies when combining multiple correlated positions.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be adjusted based on optimal f fraction, with growth rate remaining constant across perfectly correlated markets but increasing as correlation coefficient decreases below +1.00.
